rulings.Case Title: DAVID STOOPS ET AL VS. 300 BUCHANAN I3, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Plaintiff David Stoops Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants And To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Section 2031.320; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for October 14, 2020, Line 1, PLAINTIFF DAVID STOOPS' Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants And To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Section 2031.320; Request For Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendants' objections to Plaintiff's RFP Nos. 41, 50, 56, 57, 58, 61, 62, 67, 69, 70, 99 and 103 are SUSTAINED and no further response is required. Defendants' objections to Plaintiff's RFP Nos. 40 (further responses shall be limited to anything linked to property being vacated by tenants who pay under-market rent and obtaining market-rent paying tenants), 49, 59 (limited to any references to income projections higher than the current income based on current occupancy of the buildings), 60, 63, 64, 65, 66, 68, 78, 79, 80, 81, 82, 83 are OVERRULED, subject to the Court's ruling on Defendants' Motion for Protective Order set forth below. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID STOOPS ET AL VS. 300 BUCHANAN I3, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, October 14, 2020 Line 1, DEFENDANTS 300 BUCHANAN I3, LP, VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC., GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC., YAT-PANG AU, 300 BUCHANAN C1, LLC's Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions GRANTED as to Plaintiff's RFP Nos. 49, 63, 64, 65, 66, 68, 78, 79, 80, 81, 82, 83. The parties are ORDERED to meet and confer and provide the Court a proposed Stipulated Protective Order on or before September 29, 2020. Defendants' request for sanctions is DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LANCE EVANDER ET AL VS. VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, October 14, 2020 Line 2 DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC. DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LANCE EVANDER ET AL VS. VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, October 14, 2020 Line 2, DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD Amended COMPLAINT Hearing Required. By no later than 8:30 a.m. on October 14, 2020 Plaintiffs to file (and provide a courtesy copy) of a supplemental brief regarding: a. Plaintiff's estimate on the length of trial if (i) the case is to proceed as is and if (ii) the complaints are filed per building. b. For each Plaintiff asserting 10th and 11th causes of action to show in a table form: (a) element of the cause of action; (b) quote with citation to TAC factual allegation(s) in the complaint satisfying the element; and/or (c) allegations to be made if leave to amend is granted. Plaintiffs may use CACI 3060 and CACI 2548 for elements. If Plaintiff chooses any other list of elements, Plaintiff shall provide case citations. =(501/CFH)
